tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate a headless browser to a URL and return the page title and status. Use this to load web pages for inspection or interaction.

url.description: The URL to navigate to. If scheme is missing, https:// is assumed.

allow_private_network.description: If true, allows navigation to localhost/private-network hosts. Disabled by default for SSRF safety.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: List interactive elements on the current page. Returns elements with unique IDs that can be used with browser_click and browser_type.

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Take a visual screenshot of the current page. Returns a JPEG image.

full_page.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of just the viewport.

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the browser page for the current session, or all pages if close_all_pages is true.

close_all_pages.description: If true, close all browser pages and the browser context. Default: false (close only the current session page).

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page. Target the element by element_id (from browser_snapshot) or a CSS selector.

element_id.description: The element ID from a previous browser_snapshot result (e.g. "e1").

selector.description: A CSS selector to target. Used as fallback when element_id is not available.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an input element. Target by element_id (from browser_snapshot) or CSS selector.

element_id.description: The element ID from a previous browser_snapshot result (e.g. "e3").

selector.description: A CSS selector to target. Used as fallback when element_id is not available.

text.description: The text to type into the element.

clear_first.description: If true (default), clear existing content before typing. Set to false to append.

press_enter.description: If true, press Enter after typing the text.

tools.name: browser_press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key, optionally targeting a specific element. Use for Enter, Escape, Tab, arrow keys, etc.

element_id.description: Optional element ID from browser_snapshot to target.

tools.name: browser_wait_for
tools.description: Wait for a condition: a CSS selector to appear, text to appear on the page, or a fixed duration in milliseconds. Provide exactly one mode.

selector.description: Wait for an element matching this CSS selector to appear.

text.description: Wait for this text to appear on the page.

timeout.description: Maximum wait time in milliseconds (default and max: 30000).

tools.name: browser_extract
tools.description: Extract the text content of the current page. Optionally include links. Output is capped to prevent excessive token usage.

include_links.description: If true, include a list of links found on the page (up to 200).

tools.name: browser_fill_credential
tools.description: Fill a stored credential into a form field without exposing the value. Target by element_id (from browser_snapshot) or CSS selector.
